untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom momentum calculation (Z-score of price returns over 15-period lookback) and volume percentile thresholds (60th and 45th percentiles of 45-period rolling average). Standard momentum indicators (RSI, MACD, stoch) do not match the Z-score methodology. Volume percentile comparisons cannot be expressed with allowed operators and indicators. Would need custom indicator: 'momentum_zscore_15' and 'volume_percentile_45'.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally untranslatable with allowed indicators. The core requirement is momentum expressed as Z-scores (standardized deviations from mean) combined with volume percentile ranks—neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set. Attempted approximation using price direction and vol_ratio_20, but this does not capture the statistical rigor of the original signal. Recommend implementing custom momentum_zscore_15 and volume_percentile_45 indicators.
